page_title: Tokenized Money Market Funds — Digital Assets Dashboard
page_subtitle_html: Curated tokenized money market fund (TMMF) population from RWA.xyz US Treasuries and Non-U.S. Government Debt. Headline KPIs, charts, network and platform tables, and the fund population list all use the same fixed fund set; Distributed Value columns are current levels.
kpi_window_note: Distributed value uses a 30-day (30D) % change vs summed token values 30 days ago. 30D net change is the dollar change in total distributed value across all funds in the same window. Fund universe: fixed curated TMMF population on RWA.xyz US Treasuries and Non-U.S. Government Debt; KPIs, charts, and league tables use the same fund set.
key_observations_html:
• TMMFs are becoming a de facto settlement layer for institutions: several of the largest funds combine very high AUM with small holder counts—e.g. USYC (44 holders, $2.96B; ~$67M/holder), iBENJI (28 holders, $1.59B; ~$57M/holder), JTRSY (19 holders, $871M; ~$46M/holder)—suggesting on-chain cash and collateral rails rather than broad retail savings products. Ethereum still carries ~52% of aggregated MMF network share, alongside selective deployment on chains used for institutional workflows.
  • Early "flight to efficiency" shows up in 30D network share: gainers include Stellar (+2.46 pp 30D share), Solana (+2.37 pp 30D share); losers include BNB Chain (-4.35 pp 30D share), Ethereum (-2.31 pp 30D share). That pattern is consistent with liquidity migrating toward higher-throughput, lower-fee chains—though Ethereum still dominates levels in most snapshots.
  • Industry headlines emphasize Multi-chain distribution Recent coverage includes Apex Group commits to T-REX Ledger for multi-chain tokenized fund distribution - ledgerinsights.com (Google News); WisdomTree expands tokenized fund access to Solana in multichain push - CoinDesk (Google News). Multi-chain deployment headlines often reflect compliance and distribution requirements rather than deep liquidity on every chain—compare with funds that list many networks but very few holders.
  • Industry headlines emphasize Rates, yields & Fed policy Recent coverage includes Best money market account rates today, Monday, May 25, 2026: Earn up to 4.01% APY - Yahoo Finance (Google News); Tokenized Treasuries hit $15 billion as BTC price stalls, Fed rate-hike concerns build: Crypto Daily - CoinDesk (Google News). Fed and money-market yield stories can reshape inflows across tokenized MMFs—rate moves may matter as much as chain choice for near-term fund-level AUM.
  • Industry headlines emphasize Chain efficiency & migration Recent coverage includes Is Solana or XRP the Real Ethereum Killer? - 24/7 Wall St. (Google News); Circle Expands $635M Tokenized Treasury Fund to Solana Amid Rapid RWA Growth - CoinDesk (Google News). Fee and throughput narratives frequently foreshadow 30D network-share migration among tokenized funds—check whether gainers in the By network table match the chains named in coverage.

Context only—not investment advice. Observations rank fund-level and network aggregates on this page against recent tokenization and money-market headlines. Bullets are ranked from on-page data and recent industry headlines (dashboard RSS plus Google News fallback).

Key observations are AI generated and should be reviewed for accuracy.

funds_table.search_placeholder: Filter by fund name, ticker, platform, network, domicile…

networks.caption_html: Networks table sums distributed value across the curated TMMF population token deployments on each chain. 7D Δ value and market share use the same fund universe as the headline KPIs and fund population table.
networks.chart_note_html: The chart lists the top 12 networks by total value (labels include market share). Scroll the table for the full filtered list.
networks.section_intro_html: Networks — aggregate distributed value of the curated TMMF population by chain, summed from each fund's token deployments.

platforms.caption_html: Platforms table groups the same curated TMMF population by asset manager (issuer). RWA Count is the number of distinct funds in that population with exposure for the manager.
platforms.chart_note_html: The chart lists the top 12 platforms by total value (labels include market share). Scroll the table for the full filtered list.
platforms.section_intro_html: Platforms — issuer / asset-manager aggregates for the same curated TMMF population (same measures as Networks).
